title: rubus rufus var. yuliensis
intro: Rubus rufus var. yuliensis, also known as the Yulin raspberry or red raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus rufus plant species, which is a type of bramble or thorny shrub native to certain regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily its high content of anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and other polyphenols, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus rufus var. yuliensis include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and prevent certain types of cancer. Rubus rufus var. yuliensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and prevent chronic diseases.
